info.title: Arbox API
info.description: Arbox is a gym and fitness studio management platform. This API enables programmatic access to manage leads, clients, memberships, schedules, tasks, reports, and messaging.

get.description: Returns an array of all active/in-progress leads.

post.description: Creates a new lead record in the system.

get.description: Returns leads that have been converted to clients.
Returns leads that have been marked as lost.
Returns all available lead statuses configured for the business.
Returns all configured lead sources.

get.summary: Search for a user or lead
get.description: Searches for a user by email, phone, or ID. Set isLead to true to search leads specifically.

user.description: Email, phone number, or user ID to search for

isLead.description: Set to true to return lead details

post.description: Updates the status of an existing lead.
Marks an existing lead as lost/unqualified.

get.description: Returns all users (clients and/or staff) for the business.

staff.description: true to get staff only, false to get clients only

active.description: 1 for active users, 0 for inactive users

get.description: Returns data for a specific client by user ID or email address.

is_permanent.description: Must be true for permanent deletion

post.description: Verifies if a client's credentials are active.

isActive.description: Whether the client account is active

post.description: Creates a new membership or pack purchase for a client.

generate_qr.description: Generate QR code for the membership

get.description: Returns all membership and pack purchases for a specific client.
Returns the schedule for a date range (maximum 7 days).

post.description: Creates a new group session or class on the schedule.

live_link.description: Video conferencing link (e.g., Zoom, Google Meet)

cancel_limit.description: Hours before session when cancellation is no longer allowed

disable_cancellation_time.description: Hours before session when cancellation is disabled

enable_late_cancellation.description: Allow late cancellation with a fine

post.description: Registers a user for a trial class session.

force.description: Force registration even if conditions are not met

post.description: Cancels a user's trial class registration.

get.description: Returns scheduled appointments.
Returns all configured task types.

post.description: Creates a new task assigned to a user, lead, or as a general task.

targetableType.description: Type of entity the task is for

targetableId.description: ID of the target user or lead (required when targetableType is user or lead)

assignedTo.description: Staff member ID to assign the task to

task_owner_user_fk.description: Staff member ID who created the task

dateFormat.description: Date format for the reminder date

reminderTime.description: Reminder time in HH:mm or HH:mm A format

post.description: Sends a message via SMS, push notification, or email to one or more users.

identify.description: How to identify users in the user array

user.description: Array of user identifiers (emails, phone numbers, or user IDs)

isLead.description: Set to true if targeting leads

get.description: Returns the sales report for a given date range.
Returns a report of all leads currently in process.
Returns a report of all active members.
Returns a report of member properties and details.
Returns a report of members with frozen/on-hold memberships.
Returns members with birthdays in the specified date range.
Returns memberships expiring within the specified date range.
Returns session packs expiring within the specified date range.
Returns a report of trial class registrations within the specified date range.
Returns revenue report data.
Returns attendance report data.
Returns all studio/gym locations for the business.
Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.
Returns the detailed profile of the authenticated user.

apiKey.name: apiKey
apiKey.description: Business API key obtained from Settings > Business Information in the Arbox dashboard

type.description: Repeat type (required when repeat is true)

until.description: End date for repeating (required when type is 'until')

times.description: Number of times to repeat (required when type is 'times')

days.description: Days of week to repeat on (0=Sunday through 6=Saturday, required when repeat is true)

seriesName.description: Name for the series (required when type is 'forever')

Unauthorized.description: Authentication failed - missing or invalid API key

error.name: INVALID API KEY
error.description: Please provide a valid api key.
